value: For IB combo/BAG orders entered from the options chain, do not derive Order.action from debit vs credit. Keep entry/open combo envelopes on BUY, preserve per-leg BUY/SELL actions, and reset the top-level manual net-price override whenever the combo structure changes so the limit field re-bases to the normalized combo quote. Regressions require unit coverage for payload semantics and browser coverage for displayed combo price plus submitted payload.
